title: Vuja Mapapp
description: An AI-powered travel route generator that creates aesthetic travel maps based on your vibes. Describe your dream trip, and let AI design a beautiful route with custom styling and map themes.

title: Vuja Paper
description: An AI-first research assistant that transforms static PDFs into interactive conversations. Link any Arxiv paper and chat with it using the latest AI models directly in your browser.

title: PromptStratum
description: Get more out of your AI usage with a simple prompt layer (stratum) using my free MCP server.
